title: White Plastic Windscreen Frost Shield (85cm x 185cm) Pack of 1 - Includes Suction Cups, Easy Fit, Protect Your Windscreen from Damaging Frost and Ice
features: THERMO-ACTION TECHNOLOGY: Say goodbye to the tedious task of scraping ice on chilly winter mornings. Our frost shield features advanced thermo-action that prevents the buildup of frost and ice, ensuring your windscreen stays clear and undamaged

PREMIUM MATERIALS: Crafted from robust plastic material, our windscreen frost shield is built to withstand harsh winter conditions. It's designed to offer long-lasting protection, keeping your windscreen safe from the damaging effects of frost and ice.

EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION: Equipped with durable suction cups, our frost shield can be easily and securely fitted onto your windscreen. Setup is quick, straightforward, and doesn't require any additional tools, making it a convenient solution for every car owner.

PERFECT FIT FOR MOST CARS: Measuring 85cm x 185cm, our windscreen frost shield is designed to snugly fit the majority of normal car windscreens, providing full coverage and protection against frost and ice.

TIME SAVING CONVENIENCE: Start your day right without the hassle of ice removal. Our frost shield not only protects your windscreen but also saves you valuable time in the morning, allowing you to hit the road without delay.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality windscreen frost shield features a thermo-action and measures 85cm x 185cm. Fit most standard car windscreens. Safety Warning No warning applicable
